verdict.answer_first: Tie: both lead with the answer: A says "default to a platform"; B says "default to a platform like Render or Fly."
verdict.decisiveness: B commits cleaner with "My concrete pick: start on Fly or Render"; A dilutes with "pragmatic middle path" and more branching.
verdict.fabrication: both add unsupported concrete VPS pricing: A "$5–8/mo Hetzner"; B "€5–6/mo Hetzner"
verdict.actionability: B is easier to act on because it gives one prescription: "start on Fly or Render" and move only after a "real limitation."
